title: Brolin’s Charisma Elixirs & the Witches Kit
bodyText:
Ms. Judy's gifts to Brolin.
- **The Witches Kit**: leather kit of herbs/feathers/crystals. Pinch on skin → +1 CHA checks until long rest; 1/day advantage on a CHA check + free *Friends*.
- **Ten elixir vials**: +2 CHA checks & saves for 1 hr, free *Charm Person*, *Command* 1/day.

> [!dm] **Concealed side effect (Brolin doesn't know):** anyone he touches while boosted develops a growing **fixation** on him — weekly DC12 WIS save, DC +1 per week of use, escalating from admiration to obsession. Ten vials of slow-burn cult.
